race_meta.race_name: Midnite Are Upping The Betting Game Classified Stakes (Division II)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed belle of kt at position 2 (28.0% probability) vs top pick Starfighter (35.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~7.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Starfighter > Belle Of Kt, but actual result was Belle Of Kt > Late Claim (FR). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Belle Of Kt had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 1.3%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
